name: SLOOSH Inflatable Pool Floats Adult,2 Packs Floating Lounge Chairs,Blow up Pool Noodles for Adult Heavy Duty,Floating Chair for Party Summer Water Beach Lake Fun
bullets: INCLUDES. Sloosh Inflatable Pool Float Chairs Package includes 2 Packs 30”x16”x24” Floating Noodle Chair with Fabric Covered and Mesh Sling.
BUILT FOR COMFORT. Our pool float chairs covered with comfortable fabric and multiple high buoyancy tubes that allow you to comfortably float for hours of fun and relaxation on hot summer days.
EASY TO USE. Simply inflate our floating chair, adjust back and arm rest to your comfortable position, then lounge and relax in your pool. Features lightweight, easy carry and storage.
PERFECT IN WATER LOUNGER. Sit comfortably on the seat rest and keep your body in water to keep cool and prevent getting overheated. Perfect pool float for summer outdoor pool party.
CUSTOMER SATISFACTION. Providing an ideal satisfaction experience is our main priority to our customers. Feel free to message us through “contact sellers” if products don't meet your expectations.
